since_last: 26% of 85 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads -0.06%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 26% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.57% · BTC -0.81% · Gold +0.63% · Nasdaq100 -1.89%. 26% of 85 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at -0.06%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -0.06%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -4.75%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MGNI is the standout at +11.40%
cards.body: Leaders: MGNI +11.40%, INOD +7.91%, TLN +5.12%, SPCX +4.66%, DLR +2.92%. Laggards: MRVL -9.11%, SNAP -8.58%, INTC -8.35%, AMD -7.45%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +4.66% at $201.48
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +4.66% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
